issues.detail: The skill does not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: keyless-sign-github-actions
scenarios.rationale: Response B meets all rubric items exactly, while Response A omits the required `--yes` flag in the cosign command.

scenarios.name: attach-sbom-vuln-attestation
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric items, while Response B omits the required grype scan and uses incorrect commands and flags.
